fog rolling across moorland, treeline dissolving at edges
rain streaking past, cobblestones glistening far below
moonlight silvering distant hills, horizon barely visible
distant bonfire glow bleeding through skeletal trees
absolute darkness, faint ember-specks floating like stars
blurred headstones receding into thick ground-fog
storm clouds roiling behind, lightning-flash illuminating nothing
low mist creeping across unseen ground, ankle-deep
pale full moon low in sky, moor stretching endlessly
torch-warmth glowing at frame edges, source unseen
gnarled branches clawing into frame, wind-twisted and bare
crumbling stone wall edge, iron fence dissolving into shadow
rain-slicked stones blurred beneath, downpour obscuring all distance
fog-choked forest edge, trees fading to grey silhouettes
moonlit frost on distant ground, silver light casting long shadows
ember-glow warming frame corners, firelight dancing on mist
pure void with drifting smoke wisps, bottomless black
weathered headstone shapes barely visible through rolling fog
wind-bent dead grass in foreground, moorland dissolving beyond
storm-dark sky pressing down, heavy clouds swallowing horizon
scattered leaves tumbling past, autumn decay in motion
distant flame-flicker through fog, bonfire suggestion only
moss-covered stone edge crumbling into shadow and mist
inky darkness broken by faint bokeh rain-shimmer
moonlight filtering through bare branches, mist pooling below
